title: ix-agent MCP server
rationale: Exposes ix algorithms as MCP tools to the federation; broad reach, no per-tool usage telemetry yet.

title: DuckDB chatbot flight recorder
rationale: Just shipped; makes chatbot regressions answerable. Value reasoned, adoption not yet observed.

title: OPTIC-K voicing search
rationale: Production voicing-search index consumed by ga (optick.index); the highest-traffic ix↔ga contract.

title: Streeling learnings catalog
rationale: Shipped + drift-gated; backs the learnings-researcher. Confirmed live, modest reach.

title: Ecosystem Roadmap
rationale: Dev-facing overview of ecosystem direction; useful for steering, modest external reach.

title: GA Chat (music-theory chatbot)
rationale: Broadest user-facing surface (grounded music-theory Q&A); reach high, quality still stabilizing.

title: Grothendieck DSL
rationale: Powerful categorical composition DSL; niche audience and speculative adoption.

title: Prime Radiant
rationale: Flagship governance/assumption-graph 3D viz; high impact, no usage telemetry yet.

title: ga
rationale: Music-theory engine + demos are the ecosystem's user-facing front door; reach high, value mostly declared not yet measured.

title: Demerzel governance
rationale: Constitution + personas govern all agent actions ecosystem-wide; impact high but adoption/usage unmeasured.

title: ix
rationale: Foundational ML + governance crates underpinning the ecosystem; impact high, but most surfaces lack usage telemetry (confidence capped).
